name: Co-Marketing Agreement
description: A contract between two businesses or individuals to promote each other, cross-sell, or run a joint marketing campaign.
content:
CO-MARKETING AGREEMENT

This Co-Marketing Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {{formatDate agreement_date}} by and between {{party_1_name}} ("Party 1") and {{party_2_name}} ("Party 2"). Together, they are referred to as the "Parties".

1. THE PARTIES

Party 1:
Company / Name: {{party_1_name}}
Address: {{party_1_address}}
Authorized Representative: {{party_1_rep}}

Party 2:
Company / Name: {{party_2_name}}
Address: {{party_2_address}}
Authorized Representative: {{party_2_rep}}

2. PURPOSE AND SCOPE OF MARKETING ACTIVITIES

The Parties wish to collaborate on a joint marketing campaign to cross-promote their respective businesses. The specific marketing activities and campaigns (the "Activities") are outlined as follows:

{{marketing_activities_scope}}

3. RESPONSIBILITIES OF THE PARTIES

Party 1's Responsibilities:

{{party_1_responsibilities}}

Party 2's Responsibilities:

{{party_2_responsibilities}}

4. TERM AND TIMELINE

The marketing Activities shall commence on {{formatDate start_date}} and conclude on {{formatDate end_date}}.

{{#if timeline_schedule}}

Detailed Timeline:

{{timeline_schedule}}
{{/if}}

5. COSTS AND EXPENSES

{{#if (eq share_costs 'Yes')}}

The Parties agree to share the costs associated with the Activities. Specifically, the costs for {{shared_cost_items}} will be divided as follows: {{cost_split_ratio}}. Each Party shall bear their own internal operational costs.

{{else}}

There is no joint cost sharing under this Agreement. Each Party shall bear its own expenses and costs incurred in the performance of its respective responsibilities.

{{/if}}

6. TRADEMARK LICENSE AND APPROVALS

Each Party grants the other a non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use its trademarks, logos, and branding solely for the purposes of executing the Activities outlined in this Agreement. All co-branded marketing materials, social media posts, and public communications must be reviewed and approved in writing by both Parties prior to publication.

7. CONFIDENTIALITY

During the term of this Agreement, each Party may have access to the confidential information of the other Party. Both Parties agree to maintain the strict confidentiality of all shared proprietary data, strategies, and customer lists.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.

For Party 1
{{party_1_rep}}

Signature: _________________________

For Party 2
{{party_2_rep}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: marketing_activities_scope
fields.label: Scope of Marketing Activities
fields.placeholder: e.g., Hosting a joint webinar, cross-promoting on Instagram...

fields.name: shared_cost_items
fields.label: Shared Cost Items (If Yes)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Ad spend, Event Space Rental
